name: Provencial Chicken C/p
recipeInstructions: About 3 to 3-1/2 lbs, cut into pieces. Serve with rice or risotto as a side dish. Wash chicken pieces. Dry with paper towels. In a large frying pan, brown bacon until crisp. Remove from pan. Add butter and oil to the pan. Saute carrot and shallots until limp. Push to sides of pan. Add chicken pieces and saute until brown. Pour in brandy and ignite. When flames die, transfer chicken and vegetables to a crockery pot. Add tomatoes, wine, herbs, bacon, salt, and pepper. Cover. Cook on LOW for 8 hours. Remove cover. Skim off fat. Reduce juices until reduced by half. Makes 6 servings. Note: This country-style chicken entree interweaves the influence of Spanish, French, and Italian cuisines. Rice pilaf or risotto makes a good side dish.
